summary: Homepage Architecture Testing Complete - All features verified working. Hero section with FEATURED/style/LIVE badges, 4 story feed rows always render (Trending/Fresh/Continue/Unfinished), 11 feature cards present, Create bar with prefill, Credits display working.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js correctly implements section order: Hero → 4 Story Rows → Features Grid → Create Bar + Footer
All 4 story rows (Trending, Fresh, Continue, Unfinished) ALWAYS render with seed card fallback when real data insufficient
FEATURES array has exactly 11 items with correct paths
Hero section shows FEATURED badge, animation_style badge, and LIVE badge when video available
Story card handleClick (lines 249-261) correctly passes prefill object with title, prompt, animation_style, parent_video_id
Hero Continue Story CTA (line 175) correctly passes prefill with freshSession: true
Create bar (line 420) correctly passes prompt in prefill object
SafeImage uses IntersectionObserver with 200px rootMargin for lazy loading
Credits display shows exact count for logged-in users, skeleton while loading, login CTA for logged-out
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage architecture fully verified. All 4 story rows render with seed fallback. 11 feature cards present and navigating correctly. Hero prefill, story card prefill, and create bar prefill all working. Credits display shows 'Unlimited' for test user.

hero_section.details: Hero shows featured story with title, hook text, FEATURED/WATERCOLOR/LIVE badges, Continue Story and Create Your Version CTAs

hero_continue_story_prefill.details: Prefills Studio with title='A Cat's Big City Adventure', prompt, animation_style, parent_video_id WITHOUT auto-generation

hero_create_your_version.details: Opens fresh studio with no prefill

trending_now_row.details: Always renders with 18 story cards, badges (TRENDING, HOT, NEW)

continue_your_story_row.details: Always renders with 15 story cards (user's jobs when authenticated)

story_card_structure.details: Each card has thumbnail/gradient, title, hook text, badge, 'See what happens' CTA

story_card_click_prefill.details: Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with full prefill (title, prompt, animation_style, parent_video_id)

creator_tools_section.details: Shows 11 large feature cards with icon, title, description, CTA arrow

feature_card_navigation.details: Story Video → /app/story-video-studio, Story Series → /app/story-series, Character Memory → /app/characters

create_bar.details: Accepts input and navigates to Studio with prompt prefilled

credits_display.details: Shows 'Unlimited' for logged-in test user, skeleton while loading

story_feed_api.details: /api/engagement/story-feed returns featured_story, trending_stories, fresh_stories, continue_stories, unfinished_worlds with all required fields

feed_item_schema.details: Each item has job_id, title, hook_text, story_prompt, thumbnail_url, poster_url, preview_url, output_url, animation_style, parent_video_id, badge, character_summary
